title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kaido as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: JIMBE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You really had me worried!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My apologies, I was a bit preoccu- pied...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looking after the wounded sun pirates and then celebrating my departure with them....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For jinbe, a former shichibukai, to join our crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How REASSU- RING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Franky, Jinbe is an incredible Helmsman, you know?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there's finally a man who is able to use my dream ship to its fullest potential?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He sure'd under a giant wave with sunny!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: pleased to be on the same crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Toast?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeaaa Aaaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We don't have any alcohol, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No...I can smell booze.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And from where would that come from?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy- Dono!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to make sure that you understood the plan before we set foot on the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: From over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: LIAR!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: give it up, kin. It's useless to talk about strategy with them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yaaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Allow me to hear it as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Our Grand Scheme for this war!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since the Duke is a vassal of the Kozuki clan in this feud...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I shall command the Minks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: SHI- Shillian!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am counting on you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is highly osteentatious of me, how- ever...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I intend on leading the Samuel of Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE DEDI- CATE YOUR FULL ATTENTION ON YOUR OWN FIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss HYogoro!! Thank you for the encouraging words!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: under- stood.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought I told you this ain't an inn.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Onigashima is an island surrounded by mountains!! The only way to get in is through the main door.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Back entrance

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The giant skull is part of the mountain range, and there's a castle inside.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks to the blueprints we managed to acquire, we know there's a SECRET P47H behind the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are going to separate our forces in two, make them go around the skull, and enter the castle through the secret entrance...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: And attack Kaido when he is drunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, so that was the decoy strategy meant to trick Kanjuro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So, what's the REAL strategy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's still overestimating you!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
